resources.string: Verifying the phone is reachable and serving video…

Are both devices on the same Wi-Fi? The router may be blocking device-to-device traffic (a security feature, or AP/client isolation). Try rebooting the router — a reboot or whitelisting both devices usually fixes it.
The phone was reached but nothing is serving video on the port. Open Flick on the phone (or restart the cast), then retry.
The phone answered with HTTP status %1$d instead of video. Restart the cast on the phone, then retry.
Enter the phone\'s IP address into the URL — the blank between // and :8080 — then retry.
